rationale: Increasing the homestead exemption reduces taxable value, lowering school district M&O tax revenue and final tax collections that §49.153 usesto compute the cost of attendance credit. No direct textual conflict, but fiscal calculations under this section are affected, requiring rulemaking updates.
quote: The cost of attendance credit for a school district is computed using the final tax collections of the district.
_note: Indirect fiscal impact via reduced M&O tax revenue; no direct statutory cross-reference to Tax Code §11.13(b) exists in this section.
